name: Protein Sugar Cookies (Caramel + Graham)
description: FIRST DRAFT (to tune): protein sugar cookie reworked into a caramel + graham cookie - graham cracker crumbs folded into the dough for a golden-graham base, finished with a sugar-free caramel drizzle (0 cal) and a graham sprinkle. Doing BOTH caramel and graham for now; we can drop to just one, or go richer with real caramel, when we tune.

payload.instructionText: Once the cookies are set and cooled, drizzle with the sugar-free caramel (0 cal, so be generous) and a light sprinkle of graham crumbs. Chill briefly to set the drizzle.

payload.text: Graham crumbs in the dough give a golden-graham, s'mores-ish base; they also soak liquid, so if the dough turns dry add a tsp of milk or yogurt. SF caramel syrup is the lean drizzle (0 cal) - swap to the real brown-sugar caramel sub-recipe if you want it richer (costs calories).

payload.instructionText: Stir to combine, then stop and let the bowl sit untouched 5 minutes so the whey and pudding starches swell into a shapeable dough. If still tacky, chill 5 more minutes. Fold in the graham cracker chunks at the very end so they stay in chunky pieces rather than dissolving into the dough.

Once the cookies are set and cooled, drizzle with caramel and scatter a few extra graham cracker chunks on top. Chill briefly to set the drizzle. (Caramel = sugar-free syrup for 0 cal by default; see the note to swap in real brown-sugar caramel.)

payload.text: Break the graham crackers into rough ~1cm chunks and fold them in last for crunchy pockets (whisking them into the dry mix would pulverize them to crumbs). SF caramel syrup is the lean 0-cal drizzle; the real brown-sugar caramel sub-recipe is richer but costs calories.
